subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost cling to the firm cord of the Covenant and Testament! O true friend! From the contents of the Manifest Book, this heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بعروه العهد و المیثاق ای یار حقیقی از مضامین کتاب مبین این قلب
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @business; financial; property matters
